plugins.name: g-forge
plugins.description: Multi-agent Claude Code plugin - planned execution, production architecture, enforced review. Three integration tiers (full / balanced / light) and three voice profiles (dev / mid / eli5). Silent-observer journal + brief-alignment drift checks + proactive feature-drop triage. 17 agents, 34 skills, 48 stack profiles, 7 combo profiles, 1 supplementary profile (frontend-data-flow).
